title: Habenaria media
taxonomy: Habenaria media is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Habenaria media being a part of the Orchidoideae subfamily. The Orchidoideae subfamily is a large and diverse group that includes over 5,000 species of orchids. Habenaria media is also classified under the tribe Habenarieae.
